description: Open the separate OrbitFS command help window.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Startup.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Context.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Files.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Vent.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Journal.
Return the live OrbitFS server, panel, cloud and Sorter status.
Open the startup chooser, or load 1. Legal / 2. Wellbeing using low, medium, high, custom1 or custom2.
Load one complete text or DOCX file into active context.
List files and folders at the root or inside a folder.
Read a text file by its OrbitFS-relative path.
Open a PDF, DOCX or text file in the expandable viewer.
Open a compact preview of a PDF, DOCX or text file.
Search text content, optionally inside one folder.
Show file size, modified time and SHA-256 hash.
Create a browser link for a file. The link expires after 15 minutes.
Resolve and preview a move. The exact paths must be confirmed before execution.
Create a new folder at the supplied relative path.
Move a file or folder into _trash instead of hard deleting it.
Permanently empty _trash after listing and explicit confirmation.
Turn Pure Private Vent Mode on or off.
Save the final Vent draft. Entry date uses DD-MM-YYYY when provided.
Upload the exact saved Vent draft without another confirmation.
